items.title: YANKEES SCHEDULE
Yankees postpone Tuesday night’s game against Pirates, to play split-bill doubleheader Wednesday
items.summary: The Yankees announced that tonight’s game, scheduled for 7:05 EST against the Pittsburgh Pirates, has been postponed due to inclement weather forecasted to sustain through much of the night in New York. The Yankees and Pirates will play a split-admission doubleheader tomorrow, with Game 1 at 1:05 EST and Game 2 at 7:05 EST. Those […]
